9

11 #include "ArcGeoSim/Tests/IServiceValidator.h"

13 #include "Main/Tests/ServiceTesters/IServiceTester.h"

15 
16 #include "ServiceTestMng_axl.h"
17 
18 namespace Arcane { }
19 using namespace Arcane;
20 
21 class ServiceTestMngModule
22 : public ArcaneServiceTestMngObject
23  , public IAppServiceMng
24  , public ArcGeoSim::BaseUnitTestMng<ServiceTestMngModule>
25  // , private TimeMngBase
26 {
27  public:
28  typedef ArcGeoSim::BaseUnitTestMng<ServiceTestMngModule> BaseType ;
29 
31  ServiceTestMngModule(const Arcane::ModuleBuildInfo& mbi)
32  : ArcaneServiceTestMngObject(mbi)
33  , IAppServiceMng()
34  , BaseType(this)
35  //, TimeMngBase(mbi.m_sub_domain)
36  , m_initialized(false)
37  {
38  }
39 
41  virtual ~ServiceTestMngModule() {}
42 
43  protected:
44  void initializeAppServiceMng();
45 
46  public:
47  virtual void init();
48 
49  virtual void test() {
50  BaseType::test() ;
51  }
52 
54  virtual Arcane::VersionInfo versionInfo() const { return Arcane::VersionInfo(1,0,0); }
55 private:
56  bool m_initialized ;
57 };
58 
59 #endif /* ARCGEOSIM_TESTS_SERVICETESTMNG_SERVICETESTMNGMODULE_H */
